creator: sebastian.tymkow@gmail.com
text:
NFS hangs on connection to resource on netapp device.
I get messages like this:

nfs server nfsserver:/vol/nfs_resource: not responding

When I try to reboot machine it stucks on nfs and only power cycle can help.
I tried different kernels ( STABLE, RELEASE and brach) but none of them worked. 

Below is how NFS is' mounted.

nfsserver:/vol/nfs_resource        /nfs_resource    nfs     rw,noexec,nosuid,intr,nfsv3,mntudp,rsize=8192,wsize=8192                     0 0
